description: Use this API to specify or return the value of the maximum MOV iterations option setting. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. ierr = mov_iterations(ival, iocode)

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Value of the option setting. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, 20 by default; else output).

parameters.name: iocode
parameters.description: Indicates the operation mode of the api. (input; no default allowed).

iocode.description: set the option setting to the value specified in IVAL.
return the current value of the option setting in IVAL.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
